headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 6, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 10-3 victory. Ceddanne Rafaela led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 4 runs. In other action, the Tampa Bay Rays edged the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3, with Casey Legumina earning the win and Cole Sulser notching the save. Bryce Harper led the Philadelphia Phillies with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance in their 9-1 win over the Athletics.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Emilio Pagán (left hamstring strain) and Brandon Williamson (left shoulder fatigue) for the Cincinnati Reds, Gleyber Torres (left oblique strain) for the Detroit Tigers, Carlos Correa (left ankle tendon injury) for the Houston Astros, and Jake Cronenworth (concussion symptoms) for the San Diego Padres.

The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash, while the Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Trevor Richards to the Chicago White Sox for cash. The Atlanta Braves traded C Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash, and the Washington Nationals traded 3B Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Tigers 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 10-3 victory. Ceddanne Rafaela led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Casey Legumina earning the win and Cole Sulser notching the save. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays with 2 hits, including a home run, while Hunter Bigge impressed in relief with 2 strikeouts and no earned runs in 1 inning.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Athletics 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Athletics in a one-sided matchup, securing a 9-1 victory. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Marlins in Thrilling 9-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles outlasted the Miami Marlins in a high-scoring matchup, securing a 9-7 win. Liam Hicks led the Orioles' offense with a 4-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Fall to Rays in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays suffered a 0-3 loss to the Tampa Bay Rays, marking their defeat in the game. Myles Straw was an impact hitter for the Blue Jays.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with multiple players contributing to the win. Sal Frelick, Jackson Chourio, and Jake Bauers were among the impact hitters for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Reds Roster Hit by Injury**
top_news.summary: Cincinnati Reds right-handed pitcher Emilio Pagán has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain.

top_news.title: **Rays Make Roster Move Ahead of Friday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays have traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins in exchange for cash. This move comes as the Rays prepare for their next game on Friday.
